name: Joey Heatherton
abstract: Davenie Johanna "Joey" Heatherton (born September 14, 1944) is an American actress, dancer, and singer. A sex symbol of the 1960s and 1970s, she is best known for her many television appearances during that time.

concerts.label: Cavalcade of Stars to Benefit the Shield Institute

about_quotes.speaker: James Chirillo
about_quotes.evidence: Joey Heatherton came down and she brought with her her musical director/drummer... Jerry Bruno and I were sitting next to each other... we just sort of hit it off
about_quotes.doc_title: James Chirillo interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2007
